name: @examples/next-rsc
description: RSC consumer harness: a minimal Next.js App Router app that renders the STATELESS atoms inside a Server Component and the CLIENT atoms inside a Client Component, consuming the built dist + styles.css + tokens/css like an external consumer. Its `next build` is the regression net for the per-component `"use client"` boundaries (#80) — a layer the Vite saas-demo harness structurally cannot see. Never published.
